case_title: 406-10-12 REALTY CORP. VS. ANTHONY V MULLIGAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 406-10-12 REALTY CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 406-10-12 REALTY CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULLIGAN, ANTHONY V $1,019.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,079.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
